speaker: charlie
text: G'day Queensland, it's Saturday morning and we're back with your daily dose of good news. I'm Alex, alongside the one and only Jamie, and we've got some brilliant stories to kick off your weekend. It's Anzac Day today and fair dinkum, what a morning it's been watching Aussies come together across the country.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely Alex, tens of thousands turned out at dawn services from Sydney to Brisbane honouring our service members. This year marks the 111th anniversary of the Gallipoli landings and the turnout has been incredible. What better way to start Saturday than with that spirit of mateship and remembrance.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right Jamie, and speaking of community spirit, we've got some beauty environmental wins today plus a ripper science breakthrough that's straight out of a sci-fi movie. Not to mention the boys from Essendon and Collingwood putting on their traditional Anzac Day blockbuster at the G. Let's dive in shall we.
